title: Weatherwatch: How increased Arctic shipping affects cloud formation
excerpt: Shipping routes opened by climate change mean more industrial pollutants in the air
content_html:
The gradual reduction in Arctic ice has started to open up new shipping routes, with marine traffic increasing by about 40% over the past 12 years. All these ships leave trails of pollutants in the air, which are already having a measurable climate effect.

Aerosol particles in engine exhaust act as nuclei for water droplets, promoting cloud formation. Like aircraft, ships may leave contrails behind them in the sky.

New research by École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne, published in Environmental Research Letters, explores this effect in the Arctic. In winter, Arctic air is hazy with industrial pollutants from Europe and Asia trapped by weather systems, so more aerosols have little effect. In summer, though, when sea traffic increases, the air is clear and the research suggests a single vessel can affect cloud formation. This is true even with low-sulphur fuel, which is supposed to be more environmentally friendly.

The amount of cloud affects “radiative forcing,” how much is trapped and does not escape back to space, increasing the greenhouse effect.

Further research is needed to confirm the results of this study. But the early signs suggest the climate change that has allowed more shipping to traverse the Arctic will in turn be accelerated by that increase.

All these ships leave trails of pollutants in the air, which are already having a measurable climate effect.Aerosol particles in engine exhaust act as nuclei for water droplets, promoting cloud formation. Like aircraft, ships may leave contrails behind them in the sky.New research by École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne, published in Environmental Research Letters, explores this effect in the Arctic. In winter, Arctic air is hazy with industrial pollutants from Europe and Asia trapped by weather systems, so more aerosols have little effect. In summer, though, when sea traffic increases, the air is clear and the research suggests a single vessel can affect cloud formation. This is true even with low-sulphur fuel, which is supposed to be more environmentally friendly.The amount of cloud affects “radiative forcing,” how much is trapped and does not escape back to space, increasing the greenhouse effect.Further research is needed to confirm the results of this study. But the early signs suggest the climate change that has allowed more shipping to traverse the Arctic will in turn be accelerated by that increase.

blocks.html_en: The gradual reduction in Arctic ice has started to open up new shipping routes, with marine traffic increasing by about 40% over the past 12 years. All these ships leave trails of pollutants in the air, which are already having a measurable climate effect.

sentences.en: The gradual reduction in Arctic ice has started to open up new shipping routes, with marine traffic increasing by about 40% over the past 12 years.
sentences.zh: 北极冰层的逐渐减少已开始开辟新的航线，过去 12 年海上交通量增加了约 40%。

sentences.en: All these ships leave trails of pollutants in the air, which are already having a measurable climate effect.
sentences.zh: 所有这些船只都在空气中留下污染物痕迹，这些污染物已经对气候产生了可测量的影响。

blocks.html_en: Aerosol particles in engine exhaust act as nuclei for water droplets, promoting cloud formation. Like aircraft, ships may leave contrails behind them in the sky.

sentences.en: Aerosol particles in engine exhaust act as nuclei for water droplets, promoting cloud formation.
sentences.zh: 发动机排气中的气溶胶颗粒充当水滴的核，促进云的形成。

sentences.en: Like aircraft, ships may leave contrails behind them in the sky.
sentences.zh: 与飞机一样，船舶也可能在天空中留下尾迹。

blocks.html_en: New research by École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne, published in Environmental Research Letters, explores this effect in the Arctic. In winter, Arctic air is hazy with industrial pollutants from Europe and Asia trapped by weather systems, so more aerosols have little effect. In summer, though, when sea traffic increases, the air is clear and the research suggests a single vessel can affect cloud formation. This is true even with low-sulphur fuel, which is supposed to be more environmentally friendly.

sentences.en: New research by École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne, published in Environmental Research Letters, explores this effect in the Arctic.
sentences.zh: 洛桑联邦理工学院发表在《环境研究快报》上的新研究探讨了北极的这种影响。

sentences.en: In winter, Arctic air is hazy with industrial pollutants from Europe and Asia trapped by weather systems, so more aerosols have little effect.
sentences.zh: 冬季，北极空气浑浊，来自欧洲和亚洲的工业污染物被天气系统困住，因此更多的气溶胶影响不大。

sentences.en: In summer, though, when sea traffic increases, the air is clear and the research suggests a single vessel can affect cloud formation.
sentences.zh: 然而，在夏季，当海上交通量增加时，空气清澈，研究表明单艘船只可以影响云的形成。

sentences.en: This is true even with low-sulphur fuel, which is supposed to be more environmentally friendly.
sentences.zh: 即使使用被认为更环保的低硫燃料也是如此。

blocks.html_en: The amount of cloud affects “radiative forcing,” how much is trapped and does not escape back to space, increasing the greenhouse effect.

sentences.en: The amount of cloud affects “radiative forcing,” how much is trapped and does not escape back to space, increasing the greenhouse effect.
sentences.zh: 云的数量会影响“辐射强迫”，即有多少云被困住而无法逃回太空，从而增加温室效应。

blocks.html_en: Further research is needed to confirm the results of this study. But the early signs suggest the climate change that has allowed more shipping to traverse the Arctic will in turn be accelerated by that increase.

sentences.en: Further research is needed to confirm the results of this study.
sentences.zh: 需要进一步的研究来证实这项研究的结果。

sentences.en: But the early signs suggest the climate change that has allowed more shipping to traverse the Arctic will in turn be accelerated by that increase.
sentences.zh: 但早期迹象表明，气候变化使得更多的船只穿越北极，而这种增加反过来又会加速气候变化。

content_html_zh:
北极冰层的逐渐减少已开始开辟新的航线，过去 12 年海上交通量增加了约 40%。 所有这些船只都在空气中留下污染物痕迹，这些污染物已经对气候产生了可测量的影响。

发动机排气中的气溶胶颗粒充当水滴的核，促进云的形成。 与飞机一样，船舶也可能在天空中留下尾迹。

洛桑联邦理工学院发表在《环境研究快报》上的新研究探讨了北极的这种影响。 冬季，北极空气浑浊，来自欧洲和亚洲的工业污染物被天气系统困住，因此更多的气溶胶影响不大。 然而，在夏季，当海上交通量增加时，空气清澈，研究表明单艘船只可以影响云的形成。 即使使用被认为更环保的低硫燃料也是如此。

云的数量会影响“辐射强迫”，即有多少云被困住而无法逃回太空，从而增加温室效应。

需要进一步的研究来证实这项研究的结果。 但早期迹象表明，气候变化使得更多的船只穿越北极，而这种增加反过来又会加速气候变化。
